summary: High‑energy New Year's show with a monster Shakedown and scorching Scarlet > Fire, captured from the FM broadcast (fair‑quality audio).
review: The performance is consistently praised – an anguished opening Shakedown, a blistering Scarlet > Fire, a moving Baby Blue, plus tight second‑set jams and a fast, aggressive third set. The recording comes from the radio/TV broadcast, so while listenable it sounds a bit hollow, mono‑compressed and occasionally muffled.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (20+) give 4–5 stars and highlight standout songs; only a few note modest audio flaws, so the weighted rating leans strongly toward a good‑to‑great show with fair recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from FM broadcast/radio (mono‑compressed). Reviewers describe the sound as "big", "hollow", "marginal" and note occasional drop‑outs, but overall it is listenable.

standout_songs: Baby Blue (It's All Over Now Baby Blue)
show_quality.setlist_flow: A thunderous, emotional opening with Shakedown, a tight second set that carries the weight of the Parrish tragedy (highlighted by Scarlet > Fire and Peggy‑O), and a fast, aggressive third set featuring Baby Blue and a seamless Space‑Spanish‑Wheel sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for his anguished vocals, expressive guitar tone, and “monster licks” that convey the night’s sorrow.
band_member_comments.Phil: Noted as sounding great in several spots, especially on "Around and Around".
